title: Audit workflow-schemas v0.1.0 typed surface (28+ shapes) — produce comprehension report
description: Comprehension bead 1/4 for agent-blame-shielded-workflow-doctrine. Read every public type in `private/universal/substrate/collectives/schema-universal/private/universal/domain/system/schema-families/workflow-schemas/v0.1.0/spm/workflow-schemas-v000-001-000/sources/`. Produce a typed audit report covering: WorkflowModel (central contract); WorkflowGraphNode/Edge/Topology (graph structure); WorkflowDispatchGroup/Strategy/JoinPolicy + FanOutPolicy/FailurePolicy (parallelism + failure); WorkflowPathItem/Arrangement/Mode (execution paths); WorkflowWorkSurface + CriticalUserJourney (binding); WorkflowProduct/Role Requirements + RoleFrontierCapability (requirements); WorkflowRoleSessionPerformance/Timespan/CostLimits (bounded resources); WorkflowKeiko + KeikoWorkflow + KeikoSignal/Status/SignalKind (稽古 practice pattern); WorkflowCompletionPacket + CompletionEvidence (typed completion); WorkflowLifecycleValidationError/Failure (typed lifecycle errors); WorkflowWhy (typed justification chain). For each: which fields are required/optional, what invariants are enforced, how it composes with adjacent types. Output: extend investigation.docc/workflow-schema-universal-landscape-2026-05-26.md with deep typed-shape summaries OR author follow-up `workflow-schemas-deep-dive-2026-05-26.md` if length warrants. Driven by investigation report Gap analysis.
